message:
feat(demo_showcase): add Services page, implement export command, fix use_color

New Services page (services.rs):
- Service catalog with filtering, status chips (Running/Degraded/Stopped),
  and details panel
- Wired into Pages replacing the former placeholder
- Pages struct now derives Default instead of manual impl

Export command implementation (main.rs):
- Implement previously-stubbed export subcommand (~90 lines)
- Support plain/html/ansi output formats, single or multi-page export
- Uses E2E test runner headlessly for rendering
- Make ansi_to_html and strip_ansi pub in app.rs for export use

Config fix:
- use_color() now checks stdout.is_terminal() and respects TERM=dumb
  instead of unconditionally returning true

Misc cleanup:
- Placeholder page says "not wired up" instead of "Coming soon"
- Dashboard removes stale TODO comment
- content.rs minor wording tweak
- theme.rs renames test to be more descriptive
- README updated for 8 pages (was 7), adds Files to table, updates keys

Snapshot updates for services and settings pages regenerated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -180,25 +180,26 @@ INFO  Session ended user="demo" duration_secs=45.2 active_sessions=0
 
 ## Pages
 
-The showcase includes 7 interactive pages:
+	The showcase includes 8 interactive pages:
 
 | # | Page | Description | Key Features |
 |---|------|-------------|--------------|
 | 1 | **Dashboard** | Overview with status cards | Real-time stats, recent jobs list |
-| 2 | **Services** | Placeholder for service status | — |
+| 2 | **Services** | Service catalog + details panel | Filter (/), status chips, notify (Enter) |
 | 3 | **Jobs** | Background task monitoring | Filterable table, job actions (n/⏎/x/R) |
 | 4 | **Logs** | Real-time log viewer | Follow mode, level filters, export |
 | 5 | **Docs** | Markdown documentation | Syntax highlighting, split-view, search |
-| 6 | **Wizard** | Multi-step form demo | huh integration, form validation |
-| 7 | **Settings** | App configuration | Theme switching, toggle controls |
+| 6 | **Files** | Filesystem browser | Navigate, preview, fixtures mode |
+| 7 | **Wizard** | Multi-step form demo | huh integration, form validation |
+| 8 | **Settings** | App configuration | Theme switching, toggle controls |
 
 ## Keybindings
 
 ### Global
 
 | Key | Action |
 |-----|--------|
-| `1-7` | Navigate to page |
+| `1-8` | Navigate to page |
 | `[` | Toggle sidebar |
 | `?` | Show help overlay |
 | `q` | Quit |
